Class Bootstrap

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.Bootstrap
public class Bootstrap extends Object
Class that handles the initialisation of the application.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(BiConsumer<Integer,String> progress) throws SQLException, IOException
      Initialises the application by creating the database tables and setting up the docs path.
      Parameters:
      progress - A BiConsumer that is used to track the progress of the initialisation.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If an error occurs while connecting to the database.
      IOException - If an error occurs while setting up the docs path.

    • getDocsPath

      public static Path getDocsPath(String docType)
